channel.title: Patchstack — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Patchstack (patchstack).

item.title: CVE-2026-57341 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress Colissimo Officiel : Méthodes de livraison pour WooCommerce plugin <= 2.9.0 - Insecure Direct Object References (IDOR) vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Insecure Direct Object References (IDOR) in Colissimo Officiel : Méthodes de livraison pour WooCommerce <= 2.9.0 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57340 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress Japanized For WooCommerce plugin <= 2.9.12 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Broken Access Control in Japanized For WooCommerce <= 2.9.12 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57339 · 6.6 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress Business Directory plugin <= 6.4.23 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Broken Access Control in Business Directory <= 6.4.23 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57338 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress ARForms plugin <= 7.1.2 - Reflected Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Unauthenticated Cross Site Scripting (XSS) in ARForms <= 7.1.2 versions.

item.title: CVE-2026-57346 · 7.1 HIGH — WordPress Embed Privacy plugin <= 1.12.3 - Arbitrary File Deletion vulnerability
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in Epiphyt Embed Privacy allows Path Traversal. This issue affects Embed Privacy: from n/a through 1.12.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-57667 · 8.5 HIGH — WordPress Groundhogg plugin <= 4.5 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Sales Representative SQL Injection in Groundhogg <= 4.5 versions.
